nasb.text: You make him to rule over the works of Your hands; You have put all things under his feet,

esv.text: You have given him dominion over the works of your hands; you have put all things under his feet,

cnv.text: 你叫他管理你手所造的， 把萬物都放在他的腳下，

ccb.text: 你派他管理你亲手造的万物， 使万物降服在他脚下：

csbs.text: 你让他管辖你手所造的， 把万有都放在他的脚下，
